noticias.resumen: These are unsettled times for the NBA's rookie class coming out of the league's All-Star break and less than six weeks remaining in the 2025-26 regular season. There's a new betting favorite to win rookie of the year, and it's not Cooper Flagg for the ...

noticias.titulo: Cooper Flagg Says It's 'All Love' Between Him and Kon Knueppel Amid Rookie of the Year Race
noticias.resumen: The former Duke teammates are the two favorites to win the coveted NBA award after two standout rookie seasons.

noticias.titulo: Kon Knueppel Gets Wild NBA Take While Leading Rookie Of The Year Odds
noticias.resumen: Whether it's his three-point shooting, size, consistency, or early impact on winning with the Hornets, Knueppel, the fourth overall pick in the 2025 NBA Draft, is currently the favorite to win the Rookie of the Year award this season.

noticias.titulo: NBA Rookie Power Rankings: Will Kon Knueppel actually beat Cooper Flagg?
noticias.resumen: Since the start of March, Ace Bailey has been right next to Knueppel and Flagg as the best rookie in the NBA, averaging 19.6 points and 4.5 rebounds per game while shooting 45.3 percent from the floor and 40.3 percent from 3-point range.
